alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing an ester group, which is indirectly attached to a carbonyl via an intervening vinyl (>C=C<) moiety.
alternative_parents.name: Vinylogous esters

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds contaning a halogen atom attached to the alpha carbon atom relative to C=O group.
alternative_parents.name: Alpha-haloketones

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing the acryloyl functional group (which has the core fragment but-3-en-2-one).
alternative_parents.name: Acryloyl compounds

alternative_parents.description: Compounds containing a chemical bond between a carbon atom and a fluorine atom.
alternative_parents.name: Organofluorides

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing an oxide group.
alternative_parents.name: Organic oxides

alternative_parents.description: Derivatives of hydrocarbons obtained by substituting one or more carbon atoms by an heteroatom. They contain at least one carbon atom and heteroatom.
alternative_parents.name: Hydrocarbon derivatives

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing the alkyl fluoride functional group with formula R-F , where R is an alkyl group.
alternative_parents.name: Alkyl fluorides

class.description: Organic compounds containing a bond between a carbon atom and an oxygen atom.
class.name: Organooxygen compounds

description: This compound belongs to the class of organic compounds known as enones. These are compounds containing the enone functional group, with the structure RC(=O)CR'.

direct_parent.description: Compounds containing the enone functional group, with the structure RC(=O)CR'.
direct_parent.name: Enones

intermediate_nodes.description: Carbonyl compounds with the general structure R#CC(=O)R' or R=CC(=O)R', where R=organyl, R'=H, N, O, organyl group or halide group.
intermediate_nodes.name: Alpha,beta-unsaturated carbonyl compounds

intermediate_nodes.description: Ketones with the general structure R#CC(=O)R' or R=CC(=O)R', where R=organyl and R'= organyl group.
intermediate_nodes.name: Alpha,beta-unsaturated ketones

kingdom.description: Compounds that contain at least one carbon atom, excluding isocyanide/cyanide and their non-hydrocarbyl derivatives, thiophosgene, carbon diselenide, carbon monosulfide, carbon disulfide, carbon subsulfide, carbon monoxide, carbon dioxide, Carbon suboxide, and dicarbon monoxide.
kingdom.name: Organic compounds

subclass.description: Organic compounds containing a carbonyl group, with the general structure RC(=O)R', where R=organyl, R'=H, N, O, organyl group or halide group.
subclass.name: Carbonyl compounds

superclass.description: Organic compounds that contain one or more oxygen atoms.
superclass.name: Organic oxygen compounds
